supporting_quote: After a treatment period of approximately 24 hours, total RNA was isolated from the cells, and FXII mRNA levels were measured by quantitative real-time RTPCR. ... FXII RNA levels were normalized to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R). Reduction of FXII RNA is presented in the tables below as percent FXII RNA relative to the amount in untreated control.
notes: Ionis-style patent; FXII measured by quantitative real-time RT-PCR with multiple primer-probe sets (e.g. RTS2992, RTS40528), consistently normalized to total RNA by RiboGreen across all examples.

supporting_quote: After a treatment period of approximately 24 hours, total RNA was isolated from the cells and PMP22 RNA levels were measured by quantitative real-time RTPCR. ... PMP22 RNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R). Results are presented in the tables below as percent PMP22 RNA levels relative to untreated control cells.
notes: Ionis-style patent; quantitative real-time RT-PCR with primer-probe sets (e.g. RTS4579, RTS35670), normalized to total RNA by RiboGreen. In vivo sciatic-nerve samples normalized to control group.

supporting_quote: RNA was isolated from the cells and DGAT2 mRNA levels were measured by quantitative real-time PCR. ... DGAT2 mRNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R). Results are presented as percent inhibition of DGAT2, relative to untreated control.
notes: Predominant normalization is total RNA by RiboGreen across the in vitro screens (primer-probe sets RTS2367, RTS2977_MGB, RTS2988_MGB). One experiment additionally reports normalization to housekeeping gene Cyclophilin A: 'Results are presented as percent inhibition of DGAT2 mRNA, relative to PBS control, normalized to the house keeping gene CyclophilinA. Similar results were obtained on normalization with RIBOGREEN(R).' So both bases appear, but RiboGreen/total RNA is predominant.

supporting_quote: After a treatment period of approximately 24 hours, RNA was isolated from the cells and IRF4 mRNA levels were measured by quantitative real-time PCR / RT-qPCR. ... IRF4 mRNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN(R) (also written RiboGreen). Results are presented in the table below as percent control of the amount in untreated cells.
notes: Ionis-style patent; quantitative real-time PCR / RT-qPCR with primer-probe sets (e.g. RTS3114, hIRF4_LTS34726, RTS4522, RTS4523), normalized to total RNA by RiboGreen. In vivo tumor samples also measured by RT-PCR; results given as percent change normalized to PBS-treated animals.
